3231460.name: Dreamstate
3231460.description:
Dreamstate is a point-and-click, sit-and-survival, and psychological horror game. You play as Jack, a once married man who sadly lost the love of his life. As Jack, you play through multiple nights where you experience his sleep paralysis.

Story mode: Play all the nights and fight off Jack's sleep paralysis and uncover secrets.

Overdose mode: A night with every enemy attacking Jack at once with the highest difficulty possible.

Paralysis mode: A game mode with a high difficulty but an endless timer. Try to survive the longest than others and compete for a higher time.
3231460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
